response.justification: Strong, versatile software craftsman with deep web/full-stack experience and some C/C++ and embedded exposure, but a poor match for this specialized role. The position has hard requirements the candidate does not meet: native-level Japanese (resume lists only English, Romanian, and basic German), Linux kernel investigation/source modification, and networking-security domain knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X, Layer-2/3, switch chips). C programming is dated (mostly 2014–2015 at National Instruments) and recent work is TypeScript/Node/DLang, not embedded firmware security.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across many languages and stacks
Some C/C++ and embedded work (LabWindows/CVI, robotic arms, low-latency systems)
Strong testing/TDD discipline and DevOps/CI tooling background
concerns: No Japanese proficiency, despite native-level being a hard requirement
No Linux kernel modification or networking-security (MACsec, 802.1X, switch) experience
Recent experience is web/full-stack, not embedded firmware in C for UNIX

key_factors.factor: No embedded security / networking domain experience
